title: Prairie Trails
writer: Frank Howard Clark, James B. Hendryx
actors: Tom Mix, Charles K. French, Kathleen O'Connor
plot: Tex Benton, a cowboy from Texas, is in love with Janet McWhorter, the daughter of a sheep rancher. Mr. McWhorter is willing to let Tex marry Janet if he lives on the ranch and tends sheep, which Tex finds objectionable. After a fi...
